backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Higgins Music Hub backend, defining all core data types (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) and persistent storage, with authorization and user-approval mixins imported.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (bulk selection checkboxes, select-all, delete-selected button, confirmation dialog, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-line summaries of all frontend source files, documenting recent changes such as bulk delete hooks, upgrade-safe array normalization, fixed argument orders in permission helpers, and reusable related-record UI components.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Timestamped execution log for Rollout 21.7 (Step 9.5) recording pre-deployment checks including TypeScript compilation, production build, Motoko compilation, canister upgrade, and post-upgrade verification steps.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact store for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to hold verbatim command outputs and build logs that are too long to include inline.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth for remaining rollout steps (Steps 10–12), covering mainnet deployment, post-launch refinements, and long-term maintenance with acceptance criteria and references to supporting documents.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and non-admin member access verification.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.3–21.4 of the Higgins Music Hub, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6, mirroring the 21.3–21.4 checklist to verify landing page, auth, five detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for admin and non-admin roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for the rollout 21.7 smoke test, capturing test user principals, entity IDs per route, console errors, and per-role pass/fail outcomes during a February 17, 2026 production test run.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, requiring two full test runs (admin and non-admin), with explicit AuthGate/ApprovalGate verification and references to a companion session log template for recording entity IDs and console output.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive mainnet smoke test checklist for Step 10 deployment, verifying landing page, authentication flows, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin roles on ICP mainnet production.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all portal routes (memberships, publishing, releases, recordings, artists, admin), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and sets up the Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/PortalAudi: Admin-only component that displays a grouped, prioritized summary of incomplete or empty portal sections using audit findings data, rendered as cards with badge indicators for high/medium/low priority items.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Approval gate component that is temporarily bypassed to always render children unconditionally, with the original approval-check logic preserved in comments for easy reversion.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page and shows a loading spinner while Internet Identity is initializing or logging in.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on sign-out and displaying appropriate labels and icons based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/bulk/BulkDeleteC: Alert dialog component that asks users to confirm bulk deletion of a specified count of entities, showing a loading spinner during the pending delete operation.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Displays a centered card with a shield alert icon and a configurable message when a user lacks permission to access an area.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Renders a centered empty-state UI with an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Shows a destructive alert banner with a title and message, converting common backend error strings into user-friendly text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Renders a full-screen skeleton placeholder with multiple skeleton rows to indicate a loading state.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Section: Displays a dashed-border placeholder card indicating unbuilt portal sections, styled by priority level (high/medium/low) with an icon and badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: Sticky top header showing the Higgins Music logo and name, with an optional login button, navigating to the home route on logo click.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Main portal layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, filtering admin-only items by user role, and providing logout functionality via TanStack Router and React Query.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: A simple outline button with a link icon that triggers an onClick handler to open a link-editing dialog.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: A modal dialog for selecting and saving related entity links (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) using multi-select lists with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: A filterable, scrollable checkbox list component for selecting multiple entities by ID from a provided options array.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Provides permission-check functions to determine if the current user can edit a record or membership, based on principal ownership or admin status, with defensive handling for missing values.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as navigable badges, resolving IDs to human-readable labels using caller entity data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's identity (or anonymously) and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: React hook that fetches and exposes the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, deriving convenience booleans like isAdmin and isApproved.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via a React context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: React hook that fetches and formats selectable entity options (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) for linking, returning all entities for admins or only caller-owned entities for regular users.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes TanStack Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development, covering both queries and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property color palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying a hero section, services overview, and co-operative membership info, with automatic redirect to the portal if the user is already authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Informational admin page explaining how to bootstrap the first administrator account by appending a secret token to the URL hash before signing in.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin dashboard showing aggregate counts for memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entries, plus a recent-activity list and audit summary.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page that lists all known users in a table and allows an administrator to change each user's role (admin, member, guest) via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry supporting inline editing of goals, plans, milestones, and notes, plus a dialog for managing related entity links.
List page for artist development entries with role-based data fetching, bulk delete with confirmation, and a dialog to create new entries.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail page for a single music release, supporting inline editing of title, release type, tracklist, key dates, and workflow checklist, as well as managing linked entities via a dialog. Permissions are checked via canEditRelease based on the caller's identity and admin status.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: List page for all releases showing a table with bulk-select/delete and a dialog to create new releases. Admins see all releases while non-admins see only their own.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Detail page for a single membership record, allowing inline editing of name, email, and status, plus managing linked entities. Edit access is gated by canEditMembership based on the caller's principal and admin status.
List page for membership profiles with a table supporting bulk-select/delete and a dialog to create new memberships. Admins see all profiles; non-admins see only their own.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Detail page for a single publishing work, supporting inline editing of title, registration status, contributors, ownership splits (validated to not exceed 100%), and notes, plus managing linked entities. Edit access is controlled by canEditPublishingWork.
Page component that lists publishing works in a table with create and bulk-delete functionality, showing all works for admins or only the caller's works for regular users.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a single recording project supporting inline editing of title, participants, session date, status, and notes, plus managing linked entities via a dialog.
Page component that lists recording projects in a table with create and bulk-delete functionality, differentiating between admin (all projects) and regular user (own projects) views.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Utility functions for safe array handling, including normalizing unknown values to arrays, checking non-empty arrays, and safely getting array lengths—primarily for upgrade resilience with backend data.
frontend/src/utils/portalAudit.ts: Centralized catalog of audit findings (missing or incomplete features) across portal sections, each with an ID, section path, description, and priority, used by placeholder components and the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides a validation function for ownership split arrays, ensuring at least one entry exists and the total percentage does not exceed 100%.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Manual QA checklist document for smoke-testing upgrade-safe related-record linking across five entity detail pages, covering build status, auth flow, portal routes, and Edit Links dialog for both admin and non-admin users across multiple rollout phases.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA checklist for verifying upgrade-safe related-record linking across all five portal detail pages post-canister-upgrade, covering Edit Links dialog behavior, save persistence after page refresh, and both admin and non-admin member roles.
project_state.json: Tracks the current build state of the portal app, listing existing bulk-select/delete features already implemented and upcoming feature requests (AR-1 through AR-4+) covering duplicate/clone, archive/restore, audit log, and more, broken into sub-parts to avoid AI processing errors.
